meaning: n.(据传说古希腊人用的)忘忧药,解忧烦之物
examples: Viewed from a distance, the island of Nepenthe looked like a cloud.
In China, the flower for mother is day lily, also known as Nepenthe.
On this day, the children of mothers sent a Nepenthe , blessed mother away from trouble and sorrow , mental and physical pleasure , health and longevity.
The ancient Greeks, when brand-new democracy got too much for them, knew the calming oblivion of eating the lotus or sipping nepenthe.
